plan_summary: A family health insurance plan covering hospitalization, day-care procedures, pre and post hospitalization expenses, and cashless treatment at network hospitals.

room_rent_cap.rule: If actual room rent exceeds the cap, all associated charges (doctor fees, procedure charges, etc.) are deducted proportionately in the same ratio.

waiting_periods.note: No claims except accidents in the first 30 days.

network_hospitals_note: Cashless is available only at network hospitals. Treatment at a non-network hospital must be claimed as reimbursement.

claim_intimation.cashless_planned: Intimate at least 48-72 hours before planned admission.
claim_intimation.cashless_emergency: Intimate within 24 hours of emergency admission.
claim_intimation.reimbursement: Submit documents within 15 days of discharge.

renewal_note: Lifelong renewability. A no-claim bonus increases sum insured for every claim-free year, up to a cap.
